title: Chip giant ASML raises 2026 guidance as AI semiconductor demand stays strong
summary: ASML beat Q1 revenue and profit expectations and raised its 2026 sales guidance. The chip maker's outperformance reflects sustained strong demand for AI semiconductor manufacturing equipment.
content: ASML beat first-quarter revenue and profit expectations and raised its sales guidance for 2026.

zh.title: 芯片巨头ASML提高2026年指导预期，AI芯片制造设备需求保持强劲
zh.summary: ASML超越了第一季度的收入和利润预期，并提高了2026年的销售指导。这家芯片制造商的超预期表现反映了对AI芯片制造设备持续强劲的需求。

title: AA fined and ordered to refund learner drivers for hidden fees
summary: The AA and BSM driving schools were fined and ordered to refund customers after failing to disclose booking fees upfront during online transactions. The penalty addresses hidden charges that violated consumer protection standards.
content: The owner of the AA and BSM driving schools failed to disclose fees upfront during online booking.

zh.title: AA被罚款并被命令向学员驾驶员退款，因隐性费用问题
zh.summary: AA和BSM驾驶学校因在线交易中未预先披露预订费用而被罚款并被命令向客户退款。该罚款针对违反消费者保护标准的隐性收费。

title: Trump takes aim at Pope Leo again, days after calling him 'weak on crime'
summary: Trump renewed criticism of Pope Leo amid ongoing tensions between the White House and Vatican over U.S.-Israel military operations against Iran. The diplomatic spat reflects broader disagreements on regional security strategy.
content: Trump's remarks came amid a running spat between the White House and the Vatican over the U.S.-Israel war against Iran.

zh.title: 特朗普再次针对教宗利奥，在称其在打击犯罪方面软弱数天后
zh.summary: 特朗普针对教宗利奥重新批评，此时白宫与梵蒂冈之间在美国-以色列对伊朗的军事行动问题上持续紧张。这一外交争执反映了对地区安全战略的更广泛分歧。

title: European markets eye mixed open as traders assess Iran war latest
summary: European stock markets are expected to open with mixed sentiment as traders evaluate the latest developments in the U.S.-Iran conflict. Market reaction hinges on assessing potential escalation or de-escalation of Middle East tensions.
content: European stocks are expected to open in mixed territory on Wednesday as regional traders assess the trajectory of the U.S.-Iran war.

zh.title: 欧洲市场关注伊朗战争最新进展，交易员评估开盘走势
zh.summary: 欧洲股市预计将以混合情绪开盘，交易员评估美伊冲突最新发展。市场反应取决于对中东紧张局势可能升级或缓解的评估。

title: Samsung SDS shares jump 20% on KKR partnership and $820 million bond purchase
summary: Samsung SDS shares surged 20% after KKR agreed to purchase $820 million in newly issued convertible bonds. The deal establishes a strategic partnership that could unlock value through alternative asset strategies.
content: KKR & Co has agreed to acquire $820 million of newly issued convertible bonds from Samsung SDS, in a deal that creates a new strategic partnership.

zh.title: 三星SDS股价因KKR合作和8.2亿美元债券购买上涨20%
zh.summary: 在KKR同意购买8.2亿美元新发行可转债后，三星SDS股价上涨20%。该交易建立了一个战略合作伙伴关系，可能通过替代资产策略释放价值。

title: Crisis grants launched for struggling families
summary: Bradford residents affected by unexpected job losses or illness can now apply for emergency financial assistance through newly launched crisis grants. The program provides immediate relief for families facing sudden hardship.
content: Bradford residents affected by unexpected job losses or illness will be able to apply for help.

zh.title: 为困难家庭推出危机补助金
zh.summary: 布拉德福德居民如果遭遇意外失业或疾病，现在可以申请通过新推出的危机补助金获得紧急财务援助。该计划为面临突然困难的家庭提供即时救济。

title: U.S. says Hormuz blockade 'fully implemented,' while signaling diplomatic off-ramp for Iran
summary: The U.S. has completed implementation of its Strait of Hormuz blockade on Iran while simultaneously signaling openness to diplomatic negotiations. This dual approach aims to maximize pressure while preserving paths toward conflict resolution.
content: The White House has been signaling a diplomatic solution to the conflict in the Middle East, as discussions around continuing negotiations with Tehran are underway.

zh.title: 美国称荷尔木兹海峡封锁"已全面实施"，同时向伊朗发出外交缓和信号
zh.summary: 美国已完成对伊朗的荷尔木兹海峡封锁，同时表示愿意进行外交谈判。这种双管齐下的方式旨在最大化施压，同时保留冲突解决的途径。

title: Trump’s Hormuz blockade puts China, India in crosshairs as U.S. pressure on Iran spills over
summary: The U.S. blockade of the Strait of Hormuz risks escalating economic pressure on China and India as critical energy markets face disruptions. The spillover tensions highlight how U.S.-Iran conflicts impact America's relationships with major Asian powers.
content: The U.S. blockade of the Strait of Hormuz risks ratcheting up pressure on two of its most consequential relationships in Asia — India and China.

zh.title: 特朗普的荷尔木兹封锁将中国、印度置于十字火力之下，美国对伊朗压力蔓延
zh.summary: 美国对荷尔木兹海峡的封锁可能加剧对中国和印度的经济压力，因为关键能源市场面临中断。这种溅射效应凸显美伊冲突如何影响美国与亚洲大国的关系。

title: U.S. crude trades lower as possible Washington-Tehran talks raise hopes for Mideast peace deal
summary: U.S. crude oil prices declined as optimism grew about potential negotiations between Washington, Tehran, and Israel to resolve Middle East tensions. Hopes of restarting talks eased concerns about prolonged Strait of Hormuz disruption.
content: Oil prices traded mixed as optimism grew that Iran may restart negotiations with the U.S. and Israel, easing tensions over the conflict that has disrupted the Strait of Hormuz.

zh.title: 美国原油交易下跌，华盛顿-德黑兰会谈可能性提高了中东和平协议的希望
zh.summary: 随着美伊和以色列进行潜在谈判以解决中东紧张局势的乐观情绪增长，美国原油价格下跌。重启会谈的希望缓解了对荷尔木兹海峡长期中断的担忧。

title: Asia markets open higher as hopes for a U.S.-Iran deal rise and oil prices drop
summary: Asia-Pacific markets gained following overnight U.S. stock gains driven by lower oil prices and optimism around a potential U.S.-Iran deal. The decline in crude reflects easing geopolitical tensions and improved risk sentiment.
content: Asia-Pacific markets track overnight gains in U.S. stocks on lower oil prices amid hopes of a Iran-U.S. deal

zh.title: 随着美伊协议希望增加和油价下跌，亚洲市场高开
zh.summary: 亚太市场在美国股市隔夜上涨的推动下上升，油价下跌和围绕潜在美伊协议的乐观情绪是主要原因。原油价格下跌反映了地缘政治紧张局势的缓解和风险情绪的改善。

title: A new CEO and a deal with Uber aren’t enough to lift this EV maker’s struggling stock
summary: Lucid Motors announced new leadership and a deal with Uber, but investors remain skeptical about the company's financial viability and survival prospects. The move highlights ongoing concerns about the EV maker's path to profitability.
content: The announcement comes amid concerns from investors about Lucid’s ability to stay afloat.

zh.title: 新首席执行官和与优步的交易不足以提振这家电动汽车制造商的低迷股价
zh.summary: 路西德汽车宣布了新的领导层和与优步的交易，但投资者仍对该公司的财务可行性和生存前景持怀疑态度。这一举措突出了人们对这家电动汽车制造商盈利之路的持续担忧。

title: Stock futures are little changed as S&P 500 approaches its all-time high: Live updates
summary: The S&P 500 ended Tuesday trading less than 1% below its January 28 all-time high, with stock futures showing minimal movement. The index continues to hover near record levels amid stable market conditions.
content: The S&P 500 ended Tuesday's session less than 1% from its all-time high set on Jan. 28.

zh.title: 随着标普500指数接近历史高点，股指期货变化不大：实时更新
zh.summary: 标普500指数周二收盘时较1月28日历史高点下跌不足1%，股指期货涨幅有限。该指数在市场平稳的情况下继续在纪录水平附近徘徊。
